# Summa Theologiae

*[Thomas Aquinas](../philosophers/aquinas.md) · 1274 · *Summa Theologiae**

Aquinas's major, unfinished work, a systematic exposition of the whole of Christian theology in the form of disputed questions, integrating the philosophy of Aristotle and containing in particular the Five Ways to God's existence and the treatise on natural law.
